zh.lifeSummary: 當Matilda de Bellamy於1183年出生在英國瓦維其可爾阿洛時，她的父親Ranulf de Bellême21歲，母親Marie Salour de Belleme21歲。她於1199年與Maurice le Boteler在英國瓦維其可爾奧維斯利 格林結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1249年在英國英格蘭史洛普爾享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matilda de Bellamy于1183年出生在英国瓦維其可爾阿洛时，她的父亲Ranulf de Bellême21岁，母亲Marie Salour de Belleme21岁。她于1199年与Maurice le Boteler在英国瓦維其可爾奧維斯利 格林结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1249年在英国英格兰史洛普爾享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

nameMeanings.name: Bellamy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and French: literal or ironic nickname meaning ‘fair friend’, from French beau ‘fair, handsome’ (bel before a vowel) + ami ‘friend’.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Matilda de Bellamy was born in 1183, in Arrow, Warwickshire, England, her father, Ranulf de Bellême, was 21 and her mother, Marie Salour de Belleme, was 21. She married Maurice le Boteler in 1199, in Oversley Green, Warwickshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died about 1249, in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matilda de Bellamy est née en 1183, à Arrow, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Ranulf de Bellême, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Marie Salour de Belleme, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Maurice le Boteler en 1199, à Oversley Green, Warwickshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1249, à Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Matilda de Bellamy 1183 in Arrow, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ranulf de Bellême 21 und ihre Mutter Marie Salour de Belleme 21. Sie hat 1199 in Oversley Green, Warwickshire, England Maurice le Boteler geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb um 1249 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda de Bellamy è nata il nel 1183 nel Arrow, Warwickshire, England, sua padre, Ranulf de Bellême, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Marie Salour de Belleme, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Maurice le Boteler nel 1199, nel Oversley Green, Warwickshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì circa 1249, nel Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 67 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Matilda de Bellamy(이)가 1183년 영국 워윅실르 아로에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ranulf de Bellême(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marie Salour de Belleme(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1199년 영국 워윅실르 버슬리 그린에서 Maurice le Boteler(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1249년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda de Bellamy nasceu em 1183, em Arrow, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ranulf de Bellême, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Marie Salour de Belleme, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Maurice le Boteler em 1199, em Oversley Green, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1249, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matilda de Bellamy родилась в 1183 г. в местности арроу, варвиккшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Ranulf de Bellême было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Marie Salour de Belleme, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Maurice le Boteler в 1199 г. в местности овирсли грин, варвиккшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла около 1249 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Matilda de Bellamy nació en 1183, en Arrow, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Ranulf de Bellême, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Marie Salour de Belleme, tenía 21 años. Murió aproximadamente 1249, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 67 años.
